bypassed_relay.name: Bypassed Relay Switch
bypassed_relay.description: A physical piece of the station's alarm system, deliberately fried. Clean sabotage — only a master mechanic could do this.

overdue_bills.name: Overdue Medical Bills
overdue_bills.description: Invoices from an Earth-side hospital for a rare pediatric treatment. A final notice of care termination.

denied_leave.name: Denied Leave Request
denied_leave.description: 'We need you here, Miller. Complete the cycle, get the hazard bonus. It’s the only way.'

server_wipe_audit.name: Server Wipe Audit
server_wipe_audit.description: Shows David's credentials were used to scrub all camera feeds in the lower decks around the time the infection breached.

hidden_stash.name: Hidden Stash of Abyssal Quartz
hidden_stash.description: Unprocessed rare minerals packaged for smuggling. This is what David did not want the cameras to see.

medical_diagnosis.name: Medical Diagnosis
medical_diagnosis.description: Stage 4 terminal illness. 'Six months left. Get your affairs in order.'

inventory_discrepancies.name: Inventory Discrepancies
inventory_discrepancies.description: Official ration manifest: large quantities of high-calorie stores are missing — far more than one cook could eat.

childs_drawing.name: A Child's Drawing
childs_drawing.description: Crayon sketch of a monster in the dark and a 'nice cook' handing out food.

makeshift_bed.name: Makeshift Bed
makeshift_bed.description: A nest of blankets in dry storage, far too small for a grown man. Someone else has been living here.

mislabeled_vials.name: Mislabeled Vials
mislabeled_vials.description: Blood samples labeled 'Severe Vitamin D Deficiency' that are violently mutating under magnification.

rejected_requisition.name: Rejected Medical Requisition
rejected_requisition.description: Corporate response: 'Denied. Too expensive. Treat with local supplies and keep the drill running.'

drill_telemetry.name: Drill Telemetry Data
drill_telemetry.description: Manual override of the drill's torque limiters on the day of the breach. Not a mechanical failure.

therapy_transcripts.name: Therapy Transcripts
therapy_transcripts.description: Arthur's psych evals: severe PTSD. 'I can hear the rocks groaning again. They're pushing us too fast.'

comms_relay_log.name: Comms Relay Log
comms_relay_log.description: An incoming emergency channel was manually muted and purged from general broadcast.

ghost_audio.name: Ghost Audio File
ghost_audio.description: The original distress call from the drill team. Screams, wet impacts, and a final plea that never reached Corporate.

altered_vent_schematics.name: Altered Ventilation Schematics
altered_vent_schematics.description: Vents from the xenobiology lab to the lower decks marked in red — a map of where infected subjects were released.

scuttling_auth_log.name: Scuttling Protocol Auth Log
scuttling_auth_log.description: Protocol Omega was not automated. Authorization: Gideon Stroud's personal biometrics.

unsent_transmission.name: Unsent Transmission
unsent_transmission.description: Draft to Earth Defense: 'The organism is highly adaptive... Do not send rescue. If this reaches the surface, humanity ends.'

muddy_footprints.name: Small Muddy Footprints
muddy_footprints.description: Tracks from the deep-sea airlocks into the core. Boots far too small for any adult crew member.

half_burned_manifesto.name: Half-Burned Manifesto
half_burned_manifesto.description: Charred note in Arthur's hand: 'Corporate won't listen. I have to break the drill. A week of downtime is better than all of us dead.'

empty_prescriptions.name: Empty Prescription Bottles
empty_prescriptions.description: Heavy sedatives from Chloe's quarters. She has not slept naturally since the breach.

hydroponics_spores.name: Hydroponics Spore Sample
hydroponics_spores.description: Bioluminescent residue on grow-bed filters. Not native algae — same glow as the cavern mud.

camera_loop_fragment.name: Camera Loop Fragment
camera_loop_fragment.description: A salvaged 3-second loop from before the wipe: a small silhouette in a vent, then static.

aris_audio_log.name: Aris Personal Audio Log
aris_audio_log.description: 'If I report this now, they'll seal the sector with us inside. I can fix this. I just need more time.'

family_photo_note.name: Gideon's Family Photo
family_photo_note.description: Pier sunlight, three faces. On the back: 'I'm sorry. I have to keep you safe from this. Don't look for me.'
